article.title: Uber L4 Chances
article.content:
I interviewed way back in December starting. Recruiter reached out. 

I don't remember the exact DSA questions as it has been almost 2 months now.

OA : 4 questions, solved all 4
DSA Screening : strong positive ( it was a 2 pointer related question )
DSA onsite : Strong positive ( DP problem, I think finding the optimal path something )
LLD onsite : positive ( design instagram, production ready code was expected with sample tests with concurrency handling)
HLD onsite : positive ( stock broker )

these all were done in december but the HM round got rescheduled multiple times and  happened after almost 4 weeks.

I have not received the feedback yet, but I don't think it went as I expected it to be. I was expecting behavioral questions however this round was entirely technical, revolved around HLD and programming language in depth questions.

I am expecting a borderline No/yes in this round.

What are the chances?

post.content: Could you share how you solved the Instagram question? I mean what do they mean by production-ready code for such a large application. Would be really helpful thanks.\n

Hay!
Did you hear back from the recruiters about the result of the interview? 
Did they proceed with an offer?

Also can you share some of the questions that were asked in Hiring Manager round?
do you got the results? \nHLD was kinda stock price notification system?
hi. What is meant by production ready code here
